scripts.build: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm run build:examples
scripts.build:astro-analyzer:wasm: cd crates/astro-analyzer && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../../packages/astro-analyzer-wasm/dist --out-name index
scripts.build:astro-analyzer:wasm-dev: cd crates/astro-analyzer && wasm-pack build --target web --dev --no-opt --out-dir ../../packages/astro-analyzer-wasm/dist --out-name index
scripts.build:lib: pnpm --filter unplugin-svelte-import build && pnpm --filter lingui-for-svelte build && pnpm --filter lingui-for-astro build
scripts.build:examples: pnpm --filter e2e-svelte build && pnpm --filter e2e-astro build
scripts.check: pnpm run check:ts && pnpm run check:svelte
scripts.check:svelte: pnpm --filter unplugin-svelte-import run check:ts && pnpm --filter lingui-for-svelte run check:svelte && pnpm --filter e2e-svelte run check:svelte
scripts.check:ts: pnpm --filter unplugin-svelte-import run check:ts && pnpm --filter lingui-for-svelte run check:ts && pnpm --filter lingui-for-astro run check:ts && pnpm --filter e2e-svelte run check:ts && pnpm --filter e2e-astro run check:ts
